kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=order_api, url=http://localhost:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC001: Create Order With Valid Data

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '93', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "John Doe", "product": "Apple Laptop", "quantity": "5", "price": "1200.50"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: Create an order with all valid parameters and verify response

test.name: TC002: Create Order With Invalid Customer Name (Single Character)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '86', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "A", "product": "Apple Laptop", "quantity": "5", "price": "1200.50"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Create order with single character customer name should fail with 422

test.name: TC003: Create Order With Invalid Quantity (Zero)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '93', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "John Doe", "product": "Apple Laptop", "quantity": "0", "price": "1200.50"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Create order with quantity 0 should fail with 422

test.name: TC004: Create Order With Invalid Price (Zero)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '89', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "John Doe", "product": "Apple Laptop", "quantity": "5", "price": "0.0"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Create order with price 0 should fail with 422

test.name: TC005: Get Order By Valid ID

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 path_url=/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Retrieve order using valid order ID from TC001

test.name: TC006: Get Order By Invalid ID

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/507f1f77bcf86cd799439999 path_url=/orders/507f1f77bcf86cd799439999 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Retrieve order with non-existent ID should return 404

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 path_url=/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '94', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "Jane Smith", "product": "Dell Monitor", "quantity": "3", "price": "350.75"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 path_url=/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '22', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "A"}'

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/507f1f77bcf86cd799439999 path_url=/orders/507f1f77bcf86cd799439999 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '31', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"customer_name": "Jane Smith"}'

test.name: TC010: List All Orders

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:8000/orders status=200, reason=OK headers={'date': 'Tue, 07 Apr 2026 03:18:31 GMT', 'server': 'uvicorn', 'content-length': '270', 'content-type': 'application/json'} body=[{"id":"69cdf781bee1e61d138b48ad","customer_name":"jay","product":"bat","quantity":100,"price":15000.0,"status":"Order Updated"},{"id":"69d477885ea213418f09a372","customer_name":"Jane Smith","product":"Dell Monitor","quantity":3,"price":350.75,"status":"Order Updated"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.doc: Retrieve list of all orders and verify it contains created order

test.name: TC011: Verify No Duplicate Order IDs In List

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders path_url=/orders headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:8000/orders status=200, reason=OK headers={'date': 'Tue, 07 Apr 2026 03:18:31 GMT', 'server': 'uvicorn', 'content-length': '270', 'content-type': 'application/json'} body=[{"id":"69cdf781bee1e61d138b48ad","customer_name":"jay","product":"bat","quantity":100,"price":15000.0,"status":"Order Updated"},{"id":"69d477885ea213418f09a372","customer_name":"Jane Smith","product":"Dell Monitor","quantity":3,"price":350.75,"status":"Order Updated"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get List Without Duplicates
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
List Should Contain Value
kw.doc: Fails if the ``value`` is not found from ``list``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
List Should Contain Value
kw.doc: Fails if the ``value`` is not found from ``list``.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Returns the list with duplicates removed

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.

test.doc: Get all orders and verify no duplicate IDs exist

kw.name: DELETE On Session

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:8000/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 path_url=/orders/69d477885ea213418f09a372 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
